presentation.title: Program Coach Deck 01 — AIA as Your Business Platform

slides.title: Day 14 — Now Introduce AIA
slides.body:
Not with products.
Not with commissions.
Why do thousands choose AIA as their business platform?
slides.speakerNotes:
Today AIA enters as a platform choice — not a sales pitch.
Participants have already seen the opportunity, the tool, and the scalability.
Now: why this platform?

slides.title: Platform Pillars
slides.body: Training · Mentoring · Technology · Products · Brand · Compliance · Marketing · Community · Licensing · Support
slides.speakerNotes:
Walk each pillar as venture infrastructure — not HR benefits.
Ask: which pillar would be hardest to build alone?
discussionQuestions: Which platform pillar matters most to your venture?

slides.title: Platform vs Build-It-Yourself
slides.body: Entrepreneurs leverage platforms to launch faster.
slides.speakerNotes:
Compare: starting a practice alone vs on AIA platform.
Time, cost, risk, credibility.

slides.title: THEN — The Economic Engine
slides.body:
Compensation is the economic engine of your venture.
Not the reason you joined.
slides.speakerNotes:
Huge psychological difference.
First: venture model. Then: how the venture earns.
Compensation follows platform choice — it does not drive it.
discussionQuestions: How does this reframe how you think about pay?

slides.title: Deck 01 Close — Platform Evaluation
slides.body: Afternoon: evaluate AIA as your chosen platform.
